expect: 9 swarm filters identified, >=6 with measured FPR/FNR, 1 novel cross-layer prediction
actual: 14 filters identified across 6 layers, 7 with measured selectivity, 1 novel cascade prediction (retention != accessibility)
diff: Exceeded filter count (14 vs 9). Met selectivity target (7 vs 6). Novel prediction: BLIND-SPOT 16.1% dominates aggregate FNR, not compaction 0%. Filter cascade shows retention (knowledge layer) and accessibility (attention layer) are independent — 0% loss at one can coexist with 16.1% invisibility at another.

context_filters.name: orient.py display
context_filters.input: Full state files (INDEX, NEXT, FRONTIER, SIGNALS, maintenance, git log)
context_filters.criterion: Section-level signal presence, 5-signal cap, 50-session stale threshold

attention_filters.name: UCB1 dispatch (dispatch_optimizer.py)
attention_filters.selectivity: Gini=0.492, 33/34 visited. Worsened diversity at N>100 (L-927).

attention_filters.name: task_order.py priority tiers
attention_filters.criterion: 6 tiers: COMMIT > DUE > CLOSE > STRATEGY > DISPATCH > PERIODIC
attention_filters.selectivity: Cap at 8 tasks. Not measured for FPR/FNR.

quality_filters.name: check.sh pre-commit gates
quality_filters.criterion: 11 hard FAILs (FM-01/03/10/11/13/18/19 + beliefs + contract + maintenance + tests)
quality_filters.selectivity: Hard gate — blocks commit. FPR measured for near-dup (50% word overlap threshold).

quality_filters.name: validate_beliefs.py
quality_filters.criterion: Evidence type, last-tested field, dependency resolution

temporal_filters.name: task_order.py periodic escalation
temporal_filters.criterion: Overdue > 2x cadence → escalate to DUE tier (L-985)

epistemic_filters.name: Human signal filter (PHIL-11)
epistemic_filters.selectivity: FPR=0% (passes everything), FNR=unknown. Operationally = no filter.

epistemic_filters.name: 3-S verification rule
epistemic_filters.criterion: Specific AND Stale AND Stakes-high → verify
epistemic_filters.selectivity: Not measured. L-116: filter can fail silently on confident wrong claims.

cascade_prediction.thesis: Retention != accessibility. Serial filter cascade can show 0% loss at knowledge layer (compaction) but 16.1% complete invisibility at attention layer (BLIND-SPOT). Aggregate FNR dominated by weakest filter, not strongest.

evidence.cascade_example: L-556: stale baseline (temporal) -> false URGENT (quality FP) -> wasted session (attention corrupted) -> zero production (knowledge output degraded)

cascade_prediction.novel_vs_existing: This prediction is NOT equivalent to proxy-K, UCB1 Gini, or check.sh gates. Existing tools optimize individual filter layers. The cascade prediction says cross-layer interaction (temporal filter failure corrupts quality filter) is the dominant failure mode at scale, and no tool currently monitors cross-layer propagation.

citation_network.power_law: Top 10 lessons account for disproportionate citation share (L-601=188, L-613=43, L-1=40)

f_flt2_scale_analysis.prediction: Epistemic filter degrades fastest at scale (O(N) revalidation cost, no auto-refresh)

evidence.knowledge_filter_proxyk_drift: S350: 21.7% (URGENT) → S352: 5.0% → S433: -1.7% (IMPROVED at scale via Sharpe compaction)
evidence.attention_filter_gini: S352: 0.362 → S368: 0.827 (overcorrection) → S433: 0.492 (SLIGHTLY WORSE than baseline +36%, but recovering)
evidence.epistemic_filter_decayed_pct: S377: 34.4% (n=799) → S393: 20.6% → S433: 25.2% (n=1288, IMPROVED: items grew 61%, DECAYED count grew only 18%)

f_flt2_scale_analysis.actual_scale_concern: BLIND-SPOT absolute count grew 208→210 while DECAYED% improved. Accessibility (not recency) is the real scale degradation vector. No filter currently tracks accessibility growth rate.
f_flt2_scale_analysis.root_cause_of_falsification: Countermeasures deployed (compact.py Sharpe + UCB1 saturation penalties) actively oppose the predicted degradation. The degradation was predicted without accounting for these corrective filters — a meta-level filter interaction effect.
